title: World society, the nation-state, and environmental protection - Comment on Frank, Hironaka, and Schofer
abstract: Frederick H. Buttel, World Society, the Nation-State, and Environmental Protection: Comment on Frank, Hironaka, and Schofer, American Sociological Review, Vol. 65, No. 1, Looking Forward, Looking Back: Continuity and Change at the Turn of the Millenium (Feb., 2000), pp. 117-121
